code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_FraudDetection] --> ConsentRequested: Customer service request
    
    ConsentRequested --> ConsentPresented: Show consent form
    ConsentPresented --> ConsentGranted: Customer accepts
    ConsentPresented --> ConsentRejected: Customer rejects
    
    ConsentGranted --> ConsentActive: Consent validated & active
    ConsentRejected --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: Process terminated
    
    ConsentActive --> DataAccess: Provider uses consent
    DataAccess --> ConsentActive: Ongoing data access
    
    ConsentActive --> ConsentModified: Customer modifies scope
    ConsentModified --> ConsentActive: Updated consent active
    
    ConsentActive --> ConsentExpiring: Approaching expiry
    ConsentExpiring --> ConsentRenewed: Customer renews
    ConsentExpiring --> ConsentExpired: Automatic expiry
    ConsentRenewed --> ConsentActive: Renewed consent active
    
    ConsentActive --> ConsentRevoked: Customer revokes
    ConsentExpired --> ConsentArchived: Archive expired consent
    ConsentRevoked --> ConsentArchived: Archive revoked consent
    
    ConsentArchived --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]: End of lifecycle
    
    DataAccess --> AuditLog: Log every access
    ConsentModified --> AuditLog: Log modifications
    ConsentRevoked --> AuditLog: Log revocation
    ConsentExpired --> AuditLog: Log expiry
    
    AuditLog --> ComplianceReport: Generate reports
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech的反欺诈系统画一个完整的用户授权生命周期状态图。起点应该是FraudDetection模块发起一个ConsentRequested状态，这是客服发起的数据访问请求。
明白，那从ConsentRequested之后，用户会看到同意书吗？我假设这里有一个ConsentPresented状态来展示表单？
对，ConsentPresented之后有两个分支：用户接受进入ConsentGranted，拒绝则直接终止流程，回到AuthVault。接受后需要验证，变成ConsentActive才算真正生效。
好的，主干我画好了。现在ConsentActive之后，除了正常使用数据访问，还应该考虑授权会过期的情况吧？
没错，ConsentActive要有一个ConsentExpiring的预警状态，快到期时用户可以ConsentRenewed续约，也可能没操作导致Automatic expiry进入ConsentExpired。另外用户随时能ConsentModified修改范围，或者ConsentRevoked撤销授权。
修改和续约后都回到ConsentActive对吧？那Expired和Revoked的最终归宿呢，直接结束吗？
修改和续约都回到ConsentActive。但Expired和Revoked要先进入ConsentArchived归档，最后生命周期结束回到FraudDetection。还有，所有关键操作都要记AuditLog，最后生成ComplianceReport。
完成了。DataAccess、ConsentModified、ConsentRevoked、ConsentExpired都会触发AuditLog，然后AuditLog汇总到ComplianceReport。整个生命周期闭环也连回FraudDetection了。
